notes: Seed slice (seed-buggy.c) had to be hand-stubbed: the raw git slice from fs/affs/super.c pulled in <linux/init.h> and was not standalone-compilable for the verifier mini-DB; prior reps (lu-5 rep1..rep4) appear to have stalled at this same step (only seed.patch + raw seed files present, no audit). The slice here preserves affs_remount's control-flow shape (2 ifs, 3 returns, 2 kfrees, 0 gotos) while stubbing kernel APIs.

POC first-shot passed verifier strict (F1.acq=0 F1.rel=2 F3.goto=0 F5.ret=4 F2.if=2). _fixed function deliberately flattened (no ifs, no returns, single fall-through) so that file-wide counts match the seed's single affs_remount_buggy + main pair.
Query first-shot compiled and satisfied the POC oracle (1 row on affs_remount_buggy line 30 = early-return after asymmetric kstrdup; 0 rows on _fixed). No repair iterations needed.
POC sha unchanged across the run (drift check passed).
